content.full_text:
April 8, 2009

Jim Sullivan
Committee to Recall Jerome Kern
900 North Cleveland Street, Suite 159
Oceanside, CA 92054

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-094

Dear Mr. Sullivan:

This letter confirms the receipt of your April 4, 2009, request for advice regarding Oceanside City Councilmember Jerome Kern. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329, unless you are an authorized representative of the councilmember, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B) and (c)(1).) Therefore, your request is withdrawn. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660. If you wish to file a complaint, a complaint form can be obtained from the FPPC Website at http://www.fppc.ca.gov/index.html?id=498.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
